response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in multiple programming languages and domains, but lacks the mandatory C++ development experience on Windows platform and domain expertise in Fixed Income or Investment Banking. The resume shows strong skills in JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang, and other technologies, but no significant C++ or SQL Server/Oracle experience relevant to the role.
strengths: Strong general software development background with diverse language proficiency
Experience with high-performance systems and microservices architectures
Good communication skills and involvement in open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated C++ experience on Windows platform (mandatory requirement)
No SQL Server or Oracle experience (mandatory requirement)
Lacks domain expertise in Fixed Income, Investment Banking, or Capital Markets
